title: Teyana Taylor's Golden Globe Victory
text: Teyana Taylor claimed the Golden Globe for Best Supporting Female Actor in a Motion Picture at the 83rd annual ceremony for her role as Perfidia Beverly Hills in One Battle After Another. This marked her first-ever Golden Globe nomination and win. Her Acceptance Speech: Visibly emotional upon accepting the award, Taylor expressed surprise at winning: I almost didn't even write a speech because I didn't think I would win. She addressed her daughters watching at home and thanked her family, creative team, and fellow cast members including Leonardo DiCaprio and Sean Penn. Taylor's most memorable moment came in her closing remarks dedicated to women and girls of color: Our softness is not a liability. Our depth is not too much. Our light does not need permission to shine. We belong in every room we walk into. Our voices matter, and our dreams deserve space. Additional Details: Taylor also highlighted her striking black Schiaparelli gown featuring a rhinestone-embellished back detail. One Battle After Another received nine nominations overall, making it the night's most-nominated film. Taylor's win comes after her breakout acting performance in 2023's A Thousand and One.
